title: OdysseyMons
description: OdysseyMons adds Pokémon that aren't in the initial Cobblemon mod Yet.
body:
# This Addon Adds the follwing Pokemon:
- **Jellicent Line** Spawns near Shipwrecks
- **Toxapex Line** Spawns in Beaches and warm oceans During Night
- **Greavard Line** Spawns in Dark Forests at Night
- **Iron Moth** Spawns in Hills during Day
- **Toxel** Spawns near Pasture Blocks
- **Houndour** spawns at desert villages at night and everywhere in the nether
- **Ducklett spawns** on rivers at day

**Note** Male Toxels will evolve into Amped Form and Females into Low Key Form

All of these models were originally made for a server called Cobblemon Odyssey. We have shut down for long term development. If anyone is interested in Helping out the discord is linked in this modrinth page.

Credits:
Models by BifeSalgado (N0file)
